name: Latest Wakatime Statistics Workflow

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
  schedule:
    # Runs at 12am UTC
    - cron: '0 0 * * *'

jobs:
  update-readme:
    name: Updated The Readme With Latest Wakatime Statistics.
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: athul/waka-readme@master
        with:
          WAKATIME_API_KEY: ${{ secrets.WAKATIME_API_KEY }}
